author: Tim Rice <tim.j.rice@hackrange.com>
name: login_page_check
summary: Validates a 'login page found' finding (Nikto's 'admin login page/section found' and equivalents) by fetching the URL once and counting login-form signals: password input, user/email input, login-shaped form action, login keyword in title, submit button text. 2-of-5 ⇒ validated.

args.--url: Target URL to inspect (required). The probe issues a single anonymous GET and parses the response body for login-form signals.
args.--cookie: Optional cookie to send. Login-page detection works equally well anonymously, and authenticated requests often redirect away from the login URL — anon is the right default.
